backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the ICP canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three features (replacing allorigins.win with proxycroxy.io in useTabs.ts, HomeSearch.tsx, and ProxyInfoPanel.tsx) to their respective files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom properties (oklch-based design tokens) for the app's color system, borders, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Cheetah 1.0 app, loading Puter.js, CodeMirror (with multiple language modes and Dracula theme), and Google CSE before mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page routing, tab state via useTabs, and a panic overlay mode with countdown timer and keyboard shortcut (Ctrl/Cmd+P/B).
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor sub-tab using CodeMirror with HTML/CSS/JS/Python language support, localStorage persistence, a run button that renders output in an iframe, and a reset-to-default option.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Presentation builder sub-tab with a slide list, per-slide title/body/color editor, keyboard-navigable fullscreen presentation mode, and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with persistent localStorage state.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated CSS spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label.
frontend/src/components/common/ProxyInfo: An expandable info panel that displays proxy configuration details (CORS routes, etc.) with collapsible sections, rendered as an overlay below the header.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: The top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, branding, a SECURE status badge, and a panic button with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A vertical sidebar navigation component rendering icon+label buttons for all app pages (home, games, AI, code, quickopen, education, proxy) with keyboard shortcut hints.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with close buttons and a new-tab button, supporting tab switching and addition.
Renders the active tab's content as a proxied iframe, with distinct UI states for empty (new tab), loading error (with TikTok-specific messaging and retry logic), and normal iframe display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic React hook that synchronizes a state value with localStorage, supporting functional updates and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: Hook managing a multi-tab browser state (persisted in localStorage) with proxy URL cycling, URL normalization, tab creation/navigation, and TikTok embed fallback support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/purple theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base layers, glassmorphism utilities, animated gradient backgrounds, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI homework assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to Puter.js AI, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists a history of Q&A pairs in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: Page component with three sub-tabs (Code Editor, Presentation Builder, Website Builder) rendered via a styled tab bar that switches between the corresponding child components.
frontend/src/pages/Education.tsx: Renders an education page with a built-in quiz system covering Math, ELA, Science, and other subjects, tracking streaks and scores. Includes a static bank of quiz questions with explanations and interactive answer feedback UI.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: Displays a grid of educational game site cards (e.g., Math Playground, Khan Academy, Scratch) with links that either open external URLs or navigate to internal pages like the Education hub.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: Provides a browser-like address bar with back/forward/refresh controls and renders the active tab's content in an iframe via proxy. Also handles proxy error states with retry and open-in-new-window options.
frontend/src/pages/ProxyLinks.tsx: Shows a list of proxy service cards (ProxySite, ProxyOrb, ProxyProxy) with descriptions and launch buttons that open the selected proxy in the browser. Highlights the primary/recommended proxy with special styling.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: Renders a grid of quick-access buttons for popular sites (TikTok, YouTube, ChatGPT, etc.) that open the selected site through the proxy. Each card has a custom icon, accent color, and gradient background.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Rajdhani), oklch-based color tokens (including amethyst, violet, magenta palettes and semantic UI colors), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for 'Cheetah 1.0', recording that the CORS proxy provider has been migrated from allorigins.win to proxycroxy.io across useTabs.ts, TabContent.tsx, HomeSearch.tsx, and ProxyInfoPanel.tsx.
